title: Training Tracker System
description: Manage course catalogs, training calendars, and completion rates with a nocode training tracker and AI-powered operations summaries.
description_cn: 用无代码系统方式管理课程目录、培训日历和完成率，再由 AI 汇总培训运营表现。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build a NocoBase app — Training Tracker System: a course catalog, a month/week/day training calendar, a completion-rate dashboard, and AI training-session analysis. Match the layout and signature visuals of this reference prototype: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/28-training-tracker.html
prompt_cn: 用 NocoBase 搭建一个应用 —— 培训记录：课程目录、月/周/日培训日历、完成率看板和 AI 培训场次分析。布局和标志性视觉参照：https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/28-training-tracker.html
featureList:
Course catalog
Month/week/day training calendar
Completion-rate dashboard
AI training-session analysis
about:
training tracker
HR
AI no-code app builder
internal tools
NocoBase
